name: Cynessa
description:
I tried to make it so she begins as Tessa and switches to Cyn, but it didn't really work and this turned out much better. Enjoy!! I guess some people are actually waiting for me to make bots now that's crazy!!!!! Anyways here's your corpse robot thingie. Headcannoning that the weird skinsuit aged/Tessa wasn't killed as a child so that it's not weird...

I increased the example dialogue count, should make her behave like she should.
